div1.entryFree:
Customer, 1) frequent visitor, purchaser: Meas. IV, 3, 4. Wint. IV, 4, 192. Per. IV, 6, 21. Contemptuously == visitor, guest: you minion you, are these your --s? Err. IV, 4, 63.
2) a prostitute: I think thee now some common c. All's V, 3, 287. I marry her? what? a c.! Oth. IV, 1, 123.
